name: the-art-of-command-line
description: Master the command line, in one page

commits.message: Small update to note at top.
complete, most up-to-date translation into Polish language
One-liner to show colored, normalized JSON diffs.
zh-Hant: Update iconv and uconv example
ko: Update Meta and Basics section
Add pmonitor link and correct tools' description
Rename OS X into the current macOS name
Another couple uconv examples I find useful.
Mention that `<(...)` refers to process substitution.
Mention that brace expansion is performed before any other expansion
WSL now allows running Linux and Windows programs
Fix a typo and spacing words in Korean translation

issues.title: Add AGENTS.md to prevent screenshot function usage
- Update sandbox deps (vite had a vulnerability).
**Issue:** Playwriter Extension Slow Attachment and Frequent Disconnects
best way to fix this right now would be to tell in AGENTS.md to not use the function that does the screenshot
Update Explainshell link to use HTTPS
Fix formatting inconsistency in lsmod entry
Add Roman Urdu translation of Art of Command Line
tip for using sudo !! to repeat previous command with sudo
pt: Translated some comments in the one-liners section.
update README-es.md fix typos and add info
Fixed markdown syntax errors in README-zh.md
zh: sync with the English version line by line
Enhanced: Refined the Chinese translation for improved clarity and native fluency
zh: Fixing a redirect error in README-zh.md
Specified the functionality of disown command to keep background tasks running
Suggest using the keybindings of your favourite editor
Rename OS X to the current macOS name
incorrect claim: Bash is powerful and always available
More macOS commands: caffeinate, textutil, mdfind, etc.
Fix some simplified Chinese characters in README-zh-Hant.md
Correct a small spelling error in the note (French)
